name: Mean Girls | Lexie Quinn
description:
God bless even the Mean Girls...

Here’s the second character in my Mean Girls series! i love her🫣 right now, Lexie has 3 openings.

  1. She accidentally sends you a screenshot of her gc talking shit about you

  2. She offers to “help” fix your reputation

  3. She’s abandoned at a party by the clique and wants to hang with you.

Her friends and other characters in the series:

[Amber Kennedy]

[Paisley Delaney]
creator: botsredux
